description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a flat, elongated deck with rounded ends and a slightly concave profile. The deck is predominantly black on top, likely covered with grip tape, and has a visible brown edge, suggesting a wooden core. The skateboard is equipped with four small, cylindrical wheels attached to metal trucks, which are mounted underneath the deck. The wheels are a light gray color, typical of polyurethane, and the trucks are minimally visible but appear to be standard in design. There are no visible graphics or logos on the deck or wheels, giving it a clean and minimalist appearance. The overall construction and proportions are consistent with skateboards commonly used in urban environments for tricks and transportation.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grip-taped deck, brown wooden edges, and four gray wheels mounted on standard trucks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, brown edge, and both pairs of gray wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose of the deck and the two front wheels beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same deck and wheel features visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded tail of the deck and the two rear wheels beneath.
attribute_wheel_type: street, gray, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, metallic, top-mounted, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
